# DifficultyTiersTable.PerLevelXpValue method

The per-level XP value at *level* (col `+36`). This is the anchor column — it reproduces the game's XP curve exactly (L40 = 8.0, L70 = 11.0), which is what locks the row layout.

```csharp
public float PerLevelXpValue(int level)
```
